extension.summary: Stream All The Sources - Modernized for Kodi 21+
extension.description:
SALTS is a multi-source video addon that aggregates content from various torrent sites, streaming sources, and supports debrid services (Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid). Features Jackett integration for maximum torrent indexer coverage.
Supported Sources: - Torrent Sites: 1337x, YTS, EZTV, TorrentGalaxy, Nyaa, ThePirateBay, LimeTorrents, Torrentz2, RARBG mirrors - Jackett Integration: Connect to any Jackett-supported indexer - Debrid Services: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid for cached torrents
Revived and modernized by zeus768 for Kodi 21 Omega and above. Original author: tknorris
extension.news: v2.0.0 (2026) - Complete rewrite for Kodi 21+ (Python 3) - Added modern torrent scrapers (1337x, YTS, EZTV, TorrentGalaxy, etc.) - Added Jackett integration for unlimited torrent indexers - Added Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid support - Removed dead streaming sites - Author: zeus768
